caption: A man with dark skin wears a white shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, glasses, and large over-ear headphones. He is topped with a tall, grey, pointed wig and is speaking into a black professional microphone. He is positioned in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs and posters on the wall, including one featuring the word "LEE". In front of him, an on-screen graphic reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expression and head posture. The camera angle and the surrounding environment remain constant, focusing on the man from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-camera.
